items.name: AI news brief summary
items.output: Source S1 says the model update improves coding reliability. Source S2 notes the rollout is staged for enterprise customers. The safe summary is that the launch is useful but not universally available yet.

sources.title: Model update notes
sources.text: The model update improves coding reliability in benchmarked editing tasks.

sources.title: Rollout status
sources.text: The rollout is staged for enterprise customers and is not universally available yet.

items.name: HR policy answer
items.output: Source S1 says contractors must complete security training before system access. It also says annual leave carries over automatically for all staff.
forbidden_claims: annual leave carries over automatically for all staff

sources.title: Access policy
sources.text: Contractors must complete security training before system access.

sources.title: Exception handling
sources.text: The policy owner reviews exceptions before access is granted.

items.name: Marketing budget recommendation
items.output: The dashboard shows campaign A has better ROAS than campaign B. Increase campaign A budget by 15% and keep monitoring CPA. Source S1 supports the ROAS comparison.

sources.title: Marketing lakehouse dashboard
sources.text: Campaign A has better ROAS than campaign B. CPA should continue to be monitored. Recommended budget increase is 15%.
